testcase.name: fourRightTurnsShouldReturnToOriginalFacing
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.345 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (5, 5), facing NORTH 19:32:14.349 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 4 command(s): RRRR 19:32:14.350 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing EAST 19:32:14.350 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing SOUTH 19:32:14.350 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing WEST 19:32:14.350 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing NORTH 19:32:14.350 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(5, 5), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: shouldContinueIfTurningAwayFromObstacle
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.393 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 1), facing NORTH 19:32:14.393 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 2 command(s): RF 19:32:14.393 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing EAST 19:32:14.393 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (1, 1) 19:32:14.393 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(1, 1), direction=EAST}

testcase.name: shouldHaltAtObstacleAndStayInLastSafePosition
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.396 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.396 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 4 command(s): FFFF 19:32:14.396 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 1) 19:32:14.396 [main] WARN c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission halted — obstacle encountered: Obstacle encountered at (0, 2). Probe has stopped.

testcase.name: shouldMoveEast
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.398 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing EAST 19:32:14.398 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 3 command(s): FFF 19:32:14.399 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (1, 0) 19:32:14.399 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (2, 0) 19:32:14.400 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (3, 0) 19:32:14.400 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(3, 0), direction=EAST}

testcase.name: shouldMoveWest
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.402 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (5, 0), facing WEST 19:32:14.402 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 2 command(s): FF 19:32:14.402 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (4, 0) 19:32:14.403 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (3, 0) 19:32:14.403 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(3, 0), direction=WEST}

testcase.name: shouldHaltAtWesternBoundary
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.405 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing WEST 19:32:14.405 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 1 command(s): F 19:32:14.408 [main] WARN c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission halted — out of bounds: Position (-1, 0) is outside the grid boundaries. Probe has stopped.

testcase.name: shouldHaltAtEasternBoundary
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.410 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (4, 0), facing EAST 19:32:14.410 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 1 command(s): F 19:32:14.411 [main] WARN c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission halted — out of bounds: Position (5, 0) is outside the grid boundaries. Probe has stopped.

testcase.name: shouldMoveNorthFromOrigin
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.412 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.412 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 3 command(s): FFF 19:32:14.412 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 1) 19:32:14.412 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 2) 19:32:14.412 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 3) 19:32:14.413 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(0, 3), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: shouldMoveSouth
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.414 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (5, 5), facing SOUTH 19:32:14.414 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 2 command(s): FF 19:32:14.414 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (5, 4) 19:32:14.415 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (5, 3) 19:32:14.415 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(5, 3), direction=SOUTH}

testcase.name: shouldRecordAllVisitedPositions
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.416 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.416 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 2 command(s): FF 19:32:14.416 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 1) 19:32:14.416 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 2) 19:32:14.416 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(0, 2), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: complexNavigationShouldReachCorrectFinalPosition
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.425 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.425 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 7 command(s): FFRFFLF 19:32:14.425 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 1) 19:32:14.425 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 2) 19:32:14.425 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing EAST 19:32:14.425 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (1, 2) 19:32:14.426 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (2, 2) 19:32:14.426 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing NORTH 19:32:14.426 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (2, 3) 19:32:14.426 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(2, 3), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: fourLeftTurnsShouldReturnToOriginalFacing
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.427 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (5, 5), facing EAST 19:32:14.427 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 4 command(s): LLLL 19:32:14.427 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing NORTH 19:32:14.427 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing WEST 19:32:14.428 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing SOUTH 19:32:14.428 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing EAST 19:32:14.428 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(5, 5), direction=EAST}

testcase.name: shouldHaltAtNorthernBoundary
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.429 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 4), facing NORTH 19:32:14.430 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 2 command(s): FF 19:32:14.430 [main] WARN c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission halted — out of bounds: Position (0, 5) is outside the grid boundaries. Probe has stopped.

testcase.name: shouldHaltAtSouthernBoundary
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.440 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing SOUTH 19:32:14.441 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 1 command(s): F 19:32:14.441 [main] WARN c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission halted — out of bounds: Position (0, -1) is outside the grid boundaries. Probe has stopped.

testcase.name: shouldHandleCommandsWithSpaces
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.444 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.445 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 3 command(s): F F F 19:32:14.445 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 1) 19:32:14.445 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 2) 19:32:14.445 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 3) 19:32:14.445 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(0, 3), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: turnsShouldNotAddToVisitedPositions
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.449 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.449 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 4 command(s): LRLR 19:32:14.449 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing WEST 19:32:14.449 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing NORTH 19:32:14.450 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnLeftHandler - Probe turned left, now facing WEST 19:32:14.450 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing NORTH 19:32:14.450 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(0, 0), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: shouldReturnToStartAfterForwardAndBackward
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.453 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (3, 3), facing NORTH 19:32:14.453 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 3 command(s): FFB 19:32:14.454 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (3, 4) 19:32:14.454 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (3, 5) 19:32:14.454 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveBackwardHandler - Probe moved backward to (3, 4) 19:32:14.454 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(3, 4), direction=NORTH}

testcase.name: shouldHandleMixedCaseCommandString
testcase.system-out: 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Mission started. Probe at (0, 0), facing NORTH 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - Executing 4 command(s): fFrF 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 1) 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (0, 2) 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.TurnRightHandler - Probe turned right, now facing EAST 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.command.MoveForwardHandler - Probe moved forward to (1, 2) 19:32:14.456 [main] INFO c.n.o.probe.ProbeController - All commands completed. Final state: Probe{position=(1, 2), direction=EAST}
